creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
sunpoet     2011-04-16 13:39:45 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/p5-Protocol-WebSocket Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                              pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Add p5-Protocol-WebSocket 0.00901
  
  Client/server WebSocket message and frame parser/constructor. This
  module does not provide a WebSocket server or client, but is made for
  using in http servers or clients to provide WebSocket support
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Protocol-WebSocket
  
  PR:             ports/155724
  Submitted by:   Stefan 'Sec' Zehl <sec@42.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2859    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +34 -0     ports/www/p5-Protocol-WebSocket/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/www/p5-Protocol-WebSocket/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/p5-Protocol-WebSocket/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/www/p5-Protocol-WebSocket/pkg-plist (new)
